messages.description: (with '-t' flag) table name, num of points, index of first point, sample rate, and debug flag

arguments.description: sets outlets and types: pitch, notes, env, peaks, tracks

flags.name: -npts <float>
flags.description:
set number of points in each analysis window
default: 1024

flags.name: -hop <float>
flags.description:
set number of points between each analysis
default: 512

flags.name: -npeak <float>
flags.description:
set number of sinusoidal peaks for 'peaks' output
default: 20

flags.name: -maxfreq <float>
flags.description:
set maximum sinusoid frequency in Hz
default: 1000000

flags.name: -vibrato <float>
flags.description:
set depth of vibrato to expect in semitones
default: 1

flags.name: -stabletime <float>
flags.description:
set time in msec to wait to report new notes
default: 50

flags.name: -minpower <float>
flags.description:
set minimum amplitude in dB to report a new note
default: 50

flags.name: -growth <float>
flags.description:
set amplitude growth in dB to report a repeated note
default: 7

methods.description: set number of points in each analysis window
set number of points between each analysis
set number of sinusoidal peaks for 'peaks' output
set maximum sinusoid frequency in Hz
set depth of vibrato to expect in semitones (for note output)
set time in msec to wait to report new notes (note output)
set minimum amplitude in dB to report a new note (note output)
set amplitude growth in dB to report a repeated note (note output)
